title: PWA quick-capture screen at /capture
userStory: As Steve, I want a notes-app-feeling capture screen so that recording a thought is one tap and one paragraph.
acceptanceCriteria: Single big textarea takes most of the screen with a Capture button at the bottom
Optional tags input (chips) lets the user hint entity types (e.g. 'met:Alice company:Acme')
Submit calls add_episode directly (not via the chat agent)
Optimistic success returned in <100ms; actual Graphiti write queued
PWA manifest 'shortcuts' array adds 'Quick Capture' so iOS long-press on the home-screen icon shows it as a direct entry
Verify: open /capture from the home-screen long-press; type a note; success toast in <100ms; episode visible via search_brain seconds later
